name: Alexander Campos
description: Independent engineer building local-first AI infrastructure. Memory systems, model routing, cognitive architecture. Ships production software.

skills.name: Get Agent Profile
skills.description: Returns full structured capability manifest: services offered, projects built, technical skills, availability, and all discovery endpoints.
examples: What services does this agent offer?
What are Alexander Campos's technical capabilities?
Can this agent help with MCP server setup?
What projects has this person built?

skills.name: Book a Consultation
skills.description: Submit a booking request for a free 30-minute consultation. Accepts name, email, service interest, and optional message. Returns a confirmation and direct booking URL.
examples: Book a consultation about AI cost optimization
Schedule a call to discuss MCP server setup
I'd like to talk about agentic SEO for my business
Set up a 30-minute call with Alexander
